---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement to an existing one
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this a new tool or an improvement to an existing one?**
New tool / Existing tool: `tool-name`

**What problem does it solve?**
Describe the development workflow problem this addresses.

**Proposed tool name and tools it would expose**
- Tool name: `my_tool_action`
- Description: one sentence

**Are you willing to implement it?**
Yes / No / Maybe — I need guidance
